_comment: Manual overrides applied AFTER automatic keyword extraction, keyed by exact (whitespace-normalised) video title. Use this for human judgement the keyword scanner cannot make: negation ('not a leg video'), or muscle-keyword titles that are really talk/food/holiday videos rather than training sessions. Each value sets the final 'lift' and 'muscle_group'. Use 'None' for both to force a non-lift classification. Add entries here instead of editing video_data_final.json by hand, so a re-parse never clobbers them.
